{"id":"smallhold-9c7","title":"Initialize Cargo workspace with all pinned dependencies","description":"Set up the Cargo workspace. Single binary crate named 'smallhold'. Add all dependencies from the spec with pinned major versions: axum, sqlx (sqlite feature, compile-time checked queries), activitypub-federation (LemmyNet), reqwest (rustls-tls feature, NOT openssl), serde_json, ammonia, pulldown-cmark, image, fast_image_resize, blurhash, argon2, tracing, tracing-subscriber, clap v4 (derive), tokio (full features), rsa or similar for keypair generation. Also: proptest for property-based tests, once_cell, uuid, rand, hex, base64.

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to research current crate versions and compatibility before writing Cargo.toml. Spawn a second subagent to verify each dep has no known RUSTSEC advisories.

Test discipline: cargo audit must pass clean. cargo hack check --feature-powerset must compile.

Defensive programming: Pin major versions. Use deny(unsafe_code) at crate level (exceptions: only in a dedicated ffi module if needed). Clippy config: deny warnings.","design":"Single crate with module tree: db/, api/, federation/, cli/, media/, streaming/, core/. Edition 2021. rust-version = '1.75' minimum.","acceptance_criteria":"cargo build --release succeeds; cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings passes; cargo audit reports no vulnerabilities; all spec-required crates present","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:25:45Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:25:45Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2o6","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:56Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
